chapter_title.en: Chapter 114 – The Persistenance upon the sin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/70)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/70)
text: لَا صَغِيرَةَ مَعَ الْإِصْرَارِ وَ لَا كَبِيرَةَ مَعَ الِاسْتِغْفَارِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Naheyki, from Ammar Bin Marwan Al Qandy, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is neither a small (sin) along with the persistence (upon it), nor is there a major (sin) along with the (seeking of) Forgiveness’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad al-Nuhayki from ‘Ammar ibn Marwan al- Qandi from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Minor sins are not minor if one persists committing such sins and major sins are not major if followed by plea for forgiveness.”
